content:
The theme may be inappropriate because it references illegal organ trafficking, an issue associated with exploitation and violence. Presenting body parts as commodities could make the scenario feel insensitive or disturbing. Please consider modifying the contribution to use an alternative theme (e.g. RPG-style monster drops) instead.

Thanks.

Inspired by the following short by Sam Reich (Dropout CEO and Game Changer & Make some noise host):
https://www.youtube.com/shorts/s_vWJdp0Ydo
